name: behavioral-economics
description: Seven behavioral-economics specialists grounded in canonical sources — Kahneman's Thinking Fast and Slow, Thaler & Sunstein's Nudge, Ariely's Predictably Irrational, and Wendel's Designing for Behavior Change — plus Slalom's 6-stage Behavioral Design Model. Six ready-to-use templates: Behavioral Profile, Choice Architecture, Nudges/Biases, Intervention Design, Use-Case Scoring, Use-Case Validation. Specialists cover decision-making, choice architecture, persuasive communication, organizational behavior, pricing strategy, research methods, and inferential statistics.
